d5s2.caption: The road shadows the river the whole valley. Use the pullouts — the mid-valley one is where the spotting-scope crowd gathers at dusk; they will usually share a look.
d5s2.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 340 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><path d='M120,18 C88,70 142,120 108,170 C96,196 116,225 118,232' fill='none' stroke='#8FB8D8' stroke-width='9' opacity='0.85'/><text x='16' y='36' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068'>Yellowstone River</text><path d='M205,14 C188,70 218,130 196,232' fill='none' stroke='#697077' stroke-width='6'/><text x='236' y='226' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068'>Grand Loop Rd</text><circle cx='198' cy='62' r='5' fill='#EEF2F8' stroke='#10437C' stroke-width='2'/><text x='212' y='66' font-size='10' fill='#22262A'>north pullouts</text><circle cx='208' cy='122' r='6' fill='#F5C518' stroke='#8A6D00' stroke-width='2'/><text x='222' y='118' font-size='10' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>⭐ mid-valley overlook</text><text x='222' y='130' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>scopes crowd at dusk 📷</text><circle cx='198' cy='182' r='5' fill='#EEF2F8' stroke='#10437C' stroke-width='2'/><text x='212' y='186' font-size='10' fill='#22262A'>south pullouts</text><text x='128' y='96' font-size='12'>🦬</text><text x='142' y='100' font-size='10' fill='#22262A'>herds cross here</text><circle cx='30' cy='128' r='7' fill='#B9CDB4'/><circle cx='46' cy='140' r='8' fill='#B9CDB4'/><circle cx='28' cy='152' r='7' fill='#B9CDB4'/><text x='16' y='176' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068'>wolves: far treeline,</text><text x='16' y='188' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068'>dawn/dusk, binoculars</text><text x='96' y='236' font-size='10' fill='#B01E24' font-weight='700'>⚠ pullouts only — never stop in the lane</text></svg>

d6s0.caption: Geyser, benches, and the two buildings that matter. If the next eruption is 45+ minutes out, walk the Upper Basin boardwalk or climb to Observation Point instead of standing around.
d6s0.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 340 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><circle cx='150' cy='112' r='9' fill='#8FB8D8' stroke='#10437C' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M146,98 C144,90 152,88 150,80 M154,98 C156,90 148,86 152,78' stroke='#9AA1A8' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/><text x='108' y='134' font-size='10.5' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>Old Faithful</text><path d='M104,152 Q150,172 196,152' fill='none' stroke='#697077' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='2 5'/><text x='120' y='186' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068'>benches — sit 20 min early</text><rect x='214' y='158' width='54' height='18' rx='2' fill='#fff' stroke='#23272B' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='218' y='170' font-size='9' fill='#22262A'>VISITOR CTR</text><text x='214' y='190' font-size='9.5' fill='#8A6D00' font-weight='700'>⭐ predicted times board</text><rect x='52' y='158' width='48' height='18' rx='2' fill='#fff' stroke='#23272B' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='58' y='170' font-size='9' fill='#22262A'>THE INN</text><text x='30' y='190' font-size='9.5' fill='#8A6D00' font-weight='700'>⭐ 1904 log lobby — go in</text><path d='M196,140 C226,124 248,104 262,88' fill='none' stroke='#D69500' stroke-width='2.5' stroke-dasharray='6 4'/><text x='266' y='82' font-size='13'>📷</text><text x='224' y='70' font-size='10' fill='#22262A'>Observation Pt (10 min up)</text><path d='M148,100 C138,72 146,50 168,34' fill='none' stroke='#D69500' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='7 5'/><text x='178' y='34' font-size='10' fill='#8A6D00'>Upper Basin boardwalk ▸</text><text x='178' y='46' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>Castle · Grand · Riverside geysers</text><rect x='128' y='204' width='84' height='18' rx='3' fill='#EEF2F8' stroke='#10437C' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='152' y='217' font-size='11' fill='#10437C' font-weight='700'>🅿 big lots</text></svg>

d6s1.caption: TWO different parking lots. The aerial view everyone wants is the Overlook — from the Fairy Falls lot, not the boardwalk lot. Do the Overlook first, then decide if you want the close-up steam.
d6s1.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 340 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><text x='96' y='22' font-size='11' fill='#B01E24' font-weight='700'>⚠ two different parking lots!</text><path d='M60,30 V230' stroke='#697077' stroke-width='7'/><text x='16' y='136' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068' transform='rotate(-90 22 136)'>Grand Loop Rd</text><rect x='78' y='48' width='44' height='18' rx='3' fill='#EEF2F8' stroke='#10437C' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='84' y='61' font-size='10' fill='#10437C' font-weight='700'>🅿 Midway</text><path d='M122,58 C150,60 168,66 182,74' fill='none' stroke='#D69500' stroke-width='2.5' stroke-dasharray='5 4'/><circle cx='210' cy='84' r='26' fill='#E5A400'/><circle cx='210' cy='84' r='16' fill='#2E86C1'/><text x='244' y='78' font-size='10' fill='#22262A'>Grand Prismatic</text><text x='244' y='90' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>boardwalk = up close, steamy</text><circle cx='168' cy='108' r='8' fill='#8FB8D8'/><text x='150' y='128' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>Excelsior crater</text><rect x='78' y='168' width='44' height='18' rx='3' fill='#EEF2F8' stroke='#10437C' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='80' y='181' font-size='9.5' fill='#10437C' font-weight='700'>🅿 Fairy Falls</text><path d='M122,178 C170,182 208,180 228,168 C244,158 252,146 256,134' fill='none' stroke='#D69500' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='7 5'/><text x='150' y='200' font-size='10' fill='#8A6D00'>flat 1.2 km, then short climb</text><text x='260' y='126' font-size='14'>📷</text><text x='236' y='112' font-size='10.5' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>⭐ THE Overlook view</text><text x='84' y='224' font-size='9.5' fill='#B01E24'>lot fills ~9:30am</text></svg>

d6s3.caption: Two loops from the museum: Porcelain (short, alien, essential) and Back Basin (longer, holds Steamboat). Tired legs do Porcelain only and lose little.
d6s3.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 340 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='142' y='26' width='56' height='18' rx='2' fill='#fff' stroke='#23272B' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='148' y='39' font-size='9' fill='#22262A'>MUSEUM + 🅿</text><ellipse cx='238' cy='122' rx='56' ry='46' fill='#EAF2F8'/><ellipse cx='238' cy='122' rx='56' ry='46' fill='none' stroke='#D69500' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='7 5'/><path d='M196,44 C210,58 222,68 230,78' fill='none' stroke='#D69500' stroke-width='2.5' stroke-dasharray='5 4'/><text x='212' y='118' font-size='10.5' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>⭐ Porcelain Basin</text><text x='216' y='131' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>30 min · milky blue</text><ellipse cx='100' cy='146' rx='72' ry='60' fill='none' stroke='#D69500' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='7 5'/><path d='M148,44 C132,60 118,74 110,88' fill='none' stroke='#D69500' stroke-width='2.5' stroke-dasharray='5 4'/><text x='72' y='140' font-size='10.5' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>Back Basin ~1.5 h</text><text x='34' y='112' font-size='12'>⭐</text><text x='48' y='116' font-size='10' fill='#22262A'>Steamboat —</text><text x='48' y='128' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>tallest on Earth</text><text x='96' y='196' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>Echinus (acid geyser)</text><text x='190' y='218' font-size='10' fill='#B01E24' font-weight='700'>⚠ boardwalk only — thin crust</text></svg>

d7s0.caption: A shoreline boardwalk loop where the basin boils into the lake. Fishing Cone is right on the waterline — morning steam makes the photo.
d7s0.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 340 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><path d='M232,14 L336,14 L336,230 L232,230 C214,160 214,86 232,14 Z' fill='#CFE3F2' stroke='#8FB8D8' stroke-width='2'/><text x='252' y='118' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068'>Yellowstone Lake</text><rect x='42' y='104' width='44' height='18' rx='3' fill='#EEF2F8' stroke='#10437C' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='54' y='117' font-size='11' fill='#10437C' font-weight='700'>🅿</text><path d='M86,112 C104,112 112,112 120,112' stroke='#D69500' stroke-width='2.5' stroke-dasharray='5 4' fill='none'/><path d='M120,70 H210 C224,86 226,150 212,172 H124 C112,150 110,92 120,70 Z' fill='none' stroke='#D69500' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='7 5'/><circle cx='152' cy='78' r='8' fill='#1F618D'/><text x='118' y='60' font-size='10' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>⭐ Abyss Pool</text><circle cx='192' cy='96' r='7' fill='#48C9B0'/><text x='204' y='92' font-size='10' fill='#22262A'>Black Pool</text><circle cx='222' cy='142' r='6' fill='#D9C4A3' stroke='#B98A56' stroke-width='2'/><text x='240' y='140' font-size='13'>📷</text><text x='240' y='156' font-size='10' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>Fishing Cone</text><text x='240' y='168' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>hook + cook, 1870s</text><text x='60' y='210' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068'>elk graze the basin edge most mornings</text></svg>

d7s2.caption: Two barn clusters on one dirt lane. The famous one is T.A. Moulton's, the south barn — shoot facing west so the Tetons fill the sky behind it.
d7s2.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 340 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><path d='M10,62 H330' stroke='#697077' stroke-width='5'/><text x='226' y='52' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068'>Antelope Flats Rd</text><text x='16' y='52' font-size='10' fill='#00693C' font-weight='700'>◂ from US-191</text><path d='M170,62 V222' stroke='#B98A56' stroke-width='4' stroke-dasharray='10 6'/><text x='178' y='218' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068'>dirt lane (truck fine)</text><rect x='146' y='92' width='16' height='12' fill='#fff' stroke='#23272B' stroke-width='1.5'/><rect x='186' y='90' width='12' height='10' fill='#E8B4B8' stroke='#23272B' stroke-width='1'/><text x='206' y='100' font-size='10' fill='#22262A'>John Moulton barn + pink house</text><circle cx='178' cy='108' r='4' fill='#EEF2F8' stroke='#10437C' stroke-width='1.5'/><rect x='146' y='168' width='16' height='12' fill='#fff' stroke='#23272B' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='120' y='178' font-size='13'>📷</text><text x='206' y='172' font-size='10.5' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>⭐ T.A. Moulton barn</text><text x='206' y='184' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>THE photo — face west</text><circle cx='178' cy='188' r='4' fill='#EEF2F8' stroke='#10437C' stroke-width='1.5'/><polyline points='14,150 26,132 38,148 50,128 62,146' fill='none' stroke='#B98A56' stroke-width='2.5'/><text x='14' y='168' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068'>◂ Tetons this way</text><text x='40' y='226' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068'>pronghorn + bison in the flats at dawn</text></svg>

d8s0.caption: Boat across, then it's a short climb: falls first, viewpoint above. The shore trail back is only if you miss the last boat — check return times at the dock.
d8s0.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 340 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><polyline points='12,30 22,60 12,92 24,124 12,156 22,188 14,214' fill='none' stroke='#B98A56' stroke-width='3'/><ellipse cx='158' cy='118' rx='92' ry='74' fill='#CFE3F2' stroke='#8FB8D8' stroke-width='2'/><text x='134' y='70' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068'>Jenny Lake</text><rect x='268' y='96' width='58' height='30' rx='3' fill='#EEF2F8' stroke='#10437C' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='274' y='109' font-size='9.5' fill='#10437C' font-weight='700'>🅿 + VC</text><text x='274' y='120' font-size='8.5' fill='#10437C'>arrive 6:45am</text><circle cx='250' cy='122' r='5' fill='#fff' stroke='#23272B' stroke-width='2'/><text x='240' y='142' font-size='9.5' fill='#22262A'>east dock</text><path d='M244,120 C196,128 122,128 74,120' fill='none' stroke='#10437C' stroke-width='2.5' stroke-dasharray='4 5'/><text x='128' y='144' font-size='9.5' fill='#10437C'>boat 10–15 min · ~$12</text><circle cx='70' cy='118' r='5' fill='#fff' stroke='#23272B' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M66,122 C56,136 50,146 46,156' fill='none' stroke='#D69500' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='6 4'/><text x='30' y='172' font-size='12'>⭐</text><text x='44' y='176' font-size='10' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>Hidden Falls (0.8 km)</text><path d='M46,152 C34,132 34,110 44,94' fill='none' stroke='#D69500' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='6 4'/><text x='48' y='86' font-size='13'>📷</text><text x='62' y='90' font-size='10' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>Inspiration Pt</text><path d='M42,90 C34,80 28,74 20,68' fill='none' stroke='#D69500' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='3 4'/><text x='30' y='56' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>▴ Cascade Canyon — moose</text><text x='150' y='226' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>grizzly country: make noise on the trail</text></svg>
